Name: Arlia, Destined Trainee
Flavor: A young girl with incredible potential. Hailing from a small village called Urnakle, she entered the trainee program with a chip on her shoulder and a desire to make her people proud.

Name: Mage Arlia
Ability Text: When Mage Arlia enters play, deal 10 damage to each of your other Mages Guild characters. While she is in play, your Mages Guild characters have +10 ATK.
Flavor: A young mage with incredible potential. She seeks greater strength to protect those she loves.

Name: Squire Arlia
Ability Text: Once per your opponent's turn and when an attack is declared at an individual target, redirect the attack to this unit and grant this unit +10 DEF during damage calculation.

Name: Arlia, Youngest Archmage
Affiliations: Mages Guild, The Archive, Destined, Attuned
Ability Text: If your opponent targets a card you control with a destroying effect, negate it and destroy it.
Flavor: The youngest Archmage in centuries with abilities and wisdom far beyond her years.

Name: Captain Arlia of the Royal Army
Affiliations: Kaethlaan Knights, Royal Army, King's Court (Kaethlaan), Destined
Ability Text: If King Honathan is in play, +30 ATK and DEF, this character cannot be targeted by manipulation attempts and this character cannot change control.
ChainFormula: Deal damage equal to the sum of all ATK +30.
Flavor: The Captain of the Royal Army. She fights with boldness and has sworn lifelong fealty to the crown.
Notes: Royal Army affiliation added this session

Name: The Wandering Acolyte Arlia
Ability Text: Once per turn, you may look at the top 3 cards of your deck and arrange them in any order.
Flavor: A former Mages Guild member who has become disillusioned. She searches for truth greater than theirs.

Name: The Ascended
Ability Text: This character's HP, ATK, and DEF are the number of items discarded during transformation x20. Stat-modifying riders on consumed items do not apply; ability-grant riders still apply.
TransformIn: The Wandering Acolyte Arlia + 1+ T3 Items
ChainFormula: Deal damage to all characters on both sides of the field except chained characters equal to the sum of ATK x2
ChainExtras: Characters defeated by this attack are Disgraced.
Flavor: A former mage once called Arlia who found the greatest truth of the universe. She communes with Gods and does not observe human needs.

Name: Arlia, Kael's Wife
Ability Text: TBD - married synergy with Kael, Arlia's Husband
TransformIn: Arlia (T2) + Kael at T2/T3 (marriage / paired transformation)
Flavor: TBD
Notes: Marriage form. Tier/stats/ability/flavor not yet designed.

Name: Kael, Destined Trainee
Flavor: A street boy with a desire for revenge on those who looked down on his family.
Notes: Vanilla aggressive base; all offense and no guard.

Name: Swiftblade Kael
Flavor: One of the most gifted swordsmen in the entire Royal Army; cynical and aggressive.
Notes: Hub form; vanilla beater. Highest base ATK at T2. Branches into the Loyal, Outlaw, and Subordinate roads.

Name: Kael the Shadow
Ability Text: Kael the Shadow may declare attacks against opposing passive-zone characters, not only the active zone. While King Honathan is in play, Kael the Shadow has +10 ATK.
Flavor: A royal army assassin who reports directly to King Honathan. Quiet and precise.
Notes: Loyal road. Precision = backline reach; escalates to Leader reach on The King's Blade.

Name: The King's Blade
Ability Text: The King's Blade may declare an attack against any opposing character or the opposing Leader, ignoring zone restrictions. While King Honathan is in play, The King's Blade has +20 ATK, and when The King's Blade KOs a character, draw a card.
Flavor: He has no name now — only an edge, and a hand the crown trusts to hold it.
Notes: Loyal-road terminal. Honathan's +10/+10 aura plus this rider stack; can snipe the Leader past defenders. Power-approved.

Name: Kael the Captured
Flavor: A former royal soldier captured by enemy during war. Biding his time to escape.
Notes: Outlaw-road entry; diminished POW body, vanilla. Gated on Taken Prisoner (playable only while a War is in play). War-Torn (cannot attack) comes only from Taken Prisoner, not from the War cards themselves.

Name: Kael the Runaway
Ability Text: Kael the Runaway cannot benefit from your affiliation auras.
Flavor: A former royal soldier who escaped to chase his own fate.
Notes: Outlaw road. Escape = a normal transformation (no extra event needed). Self-reliant: no aura benefit.

Name: Kael the Killer
Ability Text: Kael the Killer gains +10 ATK for each kill he has banked (kills persist across transformations). Kael the Killer cannot benefit from your affiliation auras.
Flavor: A notorious criminal who kills for the highest bidder.
Notes: Outlaw road. Uncapped kill-scaling, but DEF 0 and fragile. Power-approved.

Name: The Silent
Ability Text: The Silent must be declared as an attacker each combat phase if able. The Silent may target opposing passive-zone characters, and deals +20 damage to characters with ATK 50 or higher. The Silent cannot benefit from your affiliation auras.
Flavor: The most renowned swordsman in all the land, seeking a worthy opponent.
Notes: Outlaw-road terminal. Highest base ATK in the game (90); forced-attack downside. Power-approved.

Name: Kael, Arlia's Husband
Ability Text: TBD - married synergy with Arlia, Kael's Wife
TransformIn: Swiftblade Kael + Arlia at T2 (marriage / paired)
Flavor: A boy from the streets with a changed perspective on life. Says every day is a gift.
Notes: Love road; terminal at peace. Exits to Mourning Widower if wife dies.

Name: Mourning Widower, Kael
Ability Text: TBD
TransformIn: Kael, Arlia's Husband (when Arlia, Kael's Wife dies)
Flavor: With his wife dead, Kael has sworn to avenge her. He fights with abandon as he has nothing left to lose.
Notes: Love road; terminal dead-end

Name: Second in Command Kael
Ability Text: While you control Arlia, you may redirect attacks declared at Arlia to Second in Command Kael, and Second in Command Kael has +10 ATK and +10 DEF.
TransformIn: Swiftblade Kael, while you control Arlia at T3 or higher (Arlia is not consumed)
Flavor: Arlia's second and confidant. He is loyal to a fault and refuses to consider disobedience.
Notes: Subordinate-road T2 terminal. Presence-gated transform — no paired-transform rule needed. Bodyguard-redirect echoes Squire Arlia's Me for You.

Name: King Honathan of Kaethlaan
Affiliations: Royal Army, Kaethlaan Knights, King's Court (Kaethlaan)
Ability Text: Play requirement: you control at least two other Kaethlaan characters. While King Honathan is in play, your Royal Army and King's Court (Kaethlaan) characters have +10 ATK and +10 DEF. Leader rule: while you control a Royal Army character, King Honathan cannot be attacked.
ChainFormula: Deal damage equal to the sum of all ATK +20.
Flavor: Forty years he has kept the hearth lit. Pray you never learn what it cost him.
Notes: First non-Arlia character. Standalone T4 capstone (no transform-in). Affiliations and ability key off Royal Army; also a Kaethlaan Knight and head of the King's Court. Activates Captain Arlia's My Liege.

Name: Thestral
Flavor: Only those who have seen death can see them coming.
Notes: Single-form wild creature; cheap Dark body for filler/opposition and Light-vs-Dark testing.

Name: Lor'oak Goblin Grunt
Flavor: Numbers were always Lor'oak's only plan.
Notes: Base form of the T2-terminal tribal line; cheap fast play. Upgrade path printed on the Commander.

Name: Lor'oak Goblin Commander
ChainFormula: Deal damage equal to the sum of all ATK vs target's DEF.
Flavor: Forward. Always forward. There are always more.
Notes: T2 terminal; canonical low-tier chain example from Combat & Effects. Validates creatures-as-Leaders and lowest-tier chains.

Name: Illyego, the Orphan
Ability Text: Illyego may attack even while War-Torn.
Flavor: He does not remember a year without a war in it.
Notes: Common side-character line; attack-through-War-Torn is his identity. Needs an involuntary War-Torn source to matter (Holy War coin-flip capture).

Name: Illyego, the Soldier
Ability Text: Illyego may attack even while War-Torn.
TransformIn: Illyego, the Orphan (only while a War is in play)
Flavor: They handed him a spear before he could spell his name.
Notes: Child-soldier phase. Conscription-gated: transform only while a War is in play.

Name: Illyego, the Conqueror
Ability Text: Illyego may attack even while War-Torn. Illyego, the Conqueror has +10 ATK while a War is in play.
TransformIn: Illyego, the Soldier (after Illyego has banked 3 kills)
Flavor: He stopped waiting for the war to end and made it his.
Notes: Terminal. Self-made warlord, not a hireling - Faithless (his own master), not Mercenary. Kill-gated transform.

Name: The Acolyte Illyego
Ability Text: The Acolyte Illyego cannot become War-Torn.
Flavor: He buried the spear at a shrine and did not dig it up.
Notes: Terminal redemption branch (Light). Reuses the Disillusioned wanderer gate. Sheds War Child - he has left war behind.

Name: Goblin Soldier
Flavor: One of many. That is the point.
Notes: Common Goblin body; generic rank line (not Lor'oak). Base of Soldier -> Lieutenant -> Captain.

Name: Goblin Lieutenant
Flavor: Promoted by surviving.
Notes: Mid-rank generic Goblin.

Name: Goblin Captain
Ability Text: While Goblin Captain is in play, your other Goblin characters have +10 ATK.
Flavor: He counts heads before a battle and after. The numbers rarely match.
Notes: Terminal generic-Goblin commander; aura only (chains stay special to the Lor'oak line).

Name: Barangrang
Flavor: Gone before you finish blinking.
Notes: Common Wild creature; single-form T1 terminal.

Name: Murlifect
Ability Text: At the start of your turn, Murlifect heals 10.
Flavor: Take a piece; it grows two back.
Notes: Common Wild creature; sticky regen body.

Name: Cinderpel
Flavor: A coal that learned to run.
Notes: Common Wild creature.

Name: Tidewhisk
Flavor: It laughs in a language of bubbles.
Notes: Common Wild creature.

Name: Glimmermoth
Flavor: Drawn to every lantern; burned by none.
Notes: Common Wild creature; cheap defensive body.

Name: Bogfang
Flavor: The swamp grew teeth.
Notes: Common Wild creature; aggressive.

Name: Sootcrawler
Flavor: It lives where the fire has been.
Notes: Common Wild creature.

Name: Pyrnit
Flavor: Small, furious, briefly.
Notes: Common Wild creature; glass-cannon.

Name: Frostnip
Flavor: A cold little nip in the dark.
Notes: Common Wild creature.

Name: Galewing
Flavor: It rides the storm it makes.
Notes: Common Wild creature.

Name: Stoneback
Flavor: Patience with a shell.
Notes: Common Wild creature; cheap wall.

Name: Lumenkit
Ability Text: When Lumenkit enters play, heal one of your characters 10.
Flavor: A small warmth that follows you home.
Notes: Common Wild creature; tiny support.

Name: Touched Child Hresheeba
Flavor: A child who answers questions no one asked aloud.
Notes: Base of Hresheeba's 2-tier line (kept short so the enabler lands fast). Upgrades to Old Maid Hresheeba.

Name: Old Maid Hresheeba
Ability Text: While Old Maid Hresheeba is in play, your Divine Channel chains may be initiated with one fewer participant (minimum 1).
Flavor: She has kept the door so long she has forgotten which side she is on.
Notes: 2-tier terminal enabler (fast to deploy). Second Divine Channel body and reduces Divine Channel chain size by 1, so The Channel can assemble (or fire solo). Fetchable by Call of the Channel. Fixes assembly, not The Ascended's arrival.

Name: Channel Being
Flavor: Not a person. A doorway that learned to stand up.
Notes: Generic Divine Channel body (run multiples) to assemble The Channel chain. Single-form T1; spared by Holy War (Light).

Name: A Man Bred for War
Ability Text: While A Man Bred for War is War-Torn, he may attack, and he has +20 ATK and +20 DEF.
Flavor: They made him for one thing. Then they were surprised by it.
Notes: War-Torn payoff: capture him (Taken Prisoner / Holy War) to turn the downside into a buff. Standalone T3.

Name: Embermaw
Ability Text: When Embermaw enters play, deal 10 damage to one opposing active-zone character.
Flavor: The coal grew a mouth.
Notes: T2 Wild terminal reached only via Metamorphosis; entry burn. Added this session.

Name: Craghide
Ability Text: At the start of your turn, Craghide heals 10.
Flavor: Older than the road that bends around it.
Notes: T2 Wild terminal; sticky wall reusing the Regrow heal-over-time. Added this session.

Name: Skirrl
ChainFormula: Deal damage equal to the sum of all ATK vs target's DEF.
Flavor: A gust that picked a direction.
Notes: T2 Wild terminal; lowest-tier Wild chain (Chain 2 Wild active only). Added this session.

Name: Tidewretch
Flavor: It remembers being a river.
Notes: T2 Wild terminal; balanced body. Added this session.

Name: Hollowed Stag
Ability Text: When Hollowed Stag enters play, heal one of your characters 10.
Flavor: Antlers like a chapel with no roof.
Notes: T2 Wild terminal; entry-heal support. Added this session.

Name: Gravecreep
Flavor: What the battlefield keeps.
Notes: T2 Wild terminal; fragile aggro. Added this session.
